question_text: Which of the following correctly lists electromagnetic waves in order from longest to shortest wavelength?

options.label: A
options.text: Radio waves, microwaves, infrared, visible light, ultraviolet, X-rays, gamma rays

options.label: B
options.text: Gamma rays, X-rays, ultraviolet, visible light, infrared, microwaves, radio waves

options.label: C
options.text: Radio waves, infrared, microwaves, visible light, ultraviolet, X-rays, gamma rays

options.label: D
options.text: Visible light, infrared, radio waves, microwaves, ultraviolet, X-rays, gamma rays

explanation: The electromagnetic spectrum is ordered by wavelength from longest (radio waves) to shortest (gamma rays). A useful memory aid is 'ROYGBIV + UV/X/G' for the visible part, but radio waves are much longer than all visible light.
